title: Regression Models with Time Series Error Terms
description: A flowchart illustrating the process of specifying, estimating, and diagnosing a regression model where the error term follows a time series process.
elements: Specify Regression Model (Y_t = β0 + β1X_t + ε_t)
Model Error Term as AR/MA process (e.g., ε_t = φε_{t-1} + a_t)
Final Model: Regression with AR/MA Error
relationships: Data is used to specify the initial model
Initial model is estimated via OLS
Residuals from the OLS estimation are analyzed for serial correlation
If residuals are serially correlated, the error term is re-modeled as an AR or MA process
Final model combines the original regression with the time series structure of the error term
